name: BEN_PL_PCP
description: BEN_PL_PCP identifies all  care provider  limitations specific to each plan.

columns.Name: PL_PCP_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to BEN_PL_F.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: PCP_STRT_DT_CD
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider start date code.

columns.Name: PCP_DSGN_CD
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider designation code.

columns.Name: PCP_DPNT_DSGN_CD
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider dependent designation code.

columns.Name: PCP_RPSTRY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider Repository Y or N.

columns.Name: PCP_CAN_KEEP_FLAG
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider Can Keep Y or N.

columns.Name: PCP_RADIUS
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider radius.

columns.Name: PCP_RADIUS_UOM
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider radius unit of measure.

columns.Name: PCP_RADIUS_WARN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider Radius Warn Y or N.

columns.Name: PCP_NUM_CHGS
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider number of changes allowed.

columns.Name: PCP_NUM_CHGS_UOM
columns.Comments: Primary Care Provider number of changes allowed unit of measure.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
